visual_description: In a dimly lit, green-hued room with metal security bars on the windows, five men stand in a tense formation. The man in the center, wearing a light-colored suit, looks forward with a serious expression, while the others, dressed in dark clothing, stand behind him. The camera slowly zooms in on the man in the suit, emphasizing his central role in the scene.
audio_description: A low, ominous drone plays in the background, creating a suspenseful and tense atmosphere. The sound is continuous and adds to the dramatic mood of the scene.
